description: String escaping: one value exercises all named escapes (quote, backslash, backspace, tab, newline, form feed, carriage return) plus representative unnamed controls (U+000B, U+001F) as lowercase \u00XX escapes and an explicit solidus (U+002F) non-escape. Catches common cross-language traps: emitting a non-conformant vertical-tab named escape for U+000B, using uppercase hex in control-character escapes, and escaping forward slash.
source: hand-verified against docs/canonicalization.md §7.2, §7.6, §7.7 and RFC 8785 §3.2.2.2, §3.2.3 by Fabio M. S., 2026-04-20
